summary: UX/UI refactoring test completed successfully. All new premium design features verified: dark theme with amber/golden accents, gymie-card/gymie-btn-primary/gymie-chip classes working, humanized microcopy ('Leitura do prato'), context bar in chat, mode selector, and 3-step meal flow (input → AI analysis → edit optional).
passed_tests: Login with demo@shape.com / demo123 - working
HomePage: new premium design with rounded gymie-cards, amber/golden colors
HomePage: KPIs (calorias 62%, proteína 63%, água 43%) with progress bars
HomePage: quick actions (Gymie, Refeição, Água, Treino) functional
HomePage: check-in done card shows mood/sleep/energy
ChatPage: context bar at top shows água%, calorias%, proteína% percentages
ChatPage: mode selector expandable (Gymie, Alimentação, Treino)
ChatPage: switching modes works correctly
ChatPage: message sending and AI response working
MealsPage: list with compact cards and emojis (☀️ CAFÉ, 🍎 LANCHE, etc)
MealsPage: daily summary shows total macros
MealsPage: 'Nova refeição' modal Step 1 - description + 'Estimar macros com IA' button
MealsPage: 'Nova refeição' modal Step 2 - 'Leitura do prato' humanized text + estimated macros
MealsPage: meal type chips (Café, Lanche, Almoço, Jantar, Pré-treino, Pós-treino)
MealsPage: 'Ajustar valores' expandable + 'Refazer'/'Registrar' buttons
WorkoutPage: tabs (Planos, Sessão, Histórico) with gymie-chip styling
WorkoutPage: plan cards (A, B, C) with amber 'Iniciar' buttons
ProgressPage: 'Resumo da semana' card with AI-generated humanized text
ProgressPage: colored stat chips (treinos, água, refeições)
ProgressPage: weight history chart with gymie gradient
ProgressPage: Memory facts (brain icon) and weight log (scale icon) buttons
SettingsPage: 'TOM DO GYMIE' persona options (Tatico, Coach Parceiro, Direto, Neutro)
SettingsPage: user profile with stats (peso, meta água, calorias)
BottomNav: z-index 90 (correctly below modals at z-100)
BottomNav: amber active indicator on selected tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX/UI refactoring completed and fully tested. New premium dark theme with gymie (amber #F5A623) accent color. CSS utility classes (gymie-card, gymie-btn-primary, gymie-btn-secondary, gymie-btn-ghost, gymie-chip, gymie-input) all working. Meal flow uses 3-step pattern: input description → AI 'Leitura do prato' analysis → optional edit. Chat has context bar showing daily percentages and expandable mode selector. All navigation and modals work without overlap issues.
